message:
fix: detect backup files on database-not-found and after bd init (GH#2327)

When switching git branches, the Dolt database does not travel with the
branch, causing database not found errors. Previously the error message
only mentioned server misconfiguration. Now it:

1. Checks for .beads/backup/*.jsonl files and suggests bd backup restore
2. Lists branch switching as a common cause
3. After bd init creates a fresh DB, warns if backup files exist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
